description: Canonical rule owner map for graduation-project-builder active durable rules. IDs are stable owner identifiers; legacy_id preserves the former local numeric heading when one existed.

namespaces.CORE: cross-cutting hard gates in SKILL.md and core references
namespaces.EXEC: DOCX execution, lock, renderer, and maintenance rules
namespaces.AGENT: agent orchestration lane and task-card rules

enforcement_metadata_schema.enforcement_required: Optional boolean. When true, the entry must name validator_owner or selftest_owner.
enforcement_metadata_schema.validator_owner: Optional skill-relative path, optionally followed by ::function_or_anchor, for the validator that enforces the rule.
enforcement_metadata_schema.selftest_owner: Optional skill-relative path or list of paths, optionally followed by ::case_function, for regression coverage.
enforcement_metadata_schema.template_owner: Optional skill-relative template path, optionally followed by ::anchor, when the rule requires a template field.
enforcement_metadata_schema.generator_owner: Optional skill-relative path, optionally followed by ::function_or_anchor, when generated evidence must carry the rule.
enforcement_metadata_schema.router_anchor: Optional heading or exact router line that exposes the owner file. Required when enforcement_required is true and router_file is set.
enforcement_metadata_schema.acceptance_fields: Optional list of final-acceptance or task-card fields that must carry the rule evidence.

rules.heading: ### FMT-ABSTRACT-002. Chinese Abstract Mixed-Script Fonts Must Be Verified Per Run
required_keywords: Chinese Abstract Mixed-Script Fonts Must Be Verified Per Run
rules.router_anchor: - For any user-reported or detected Chinese abstract font issue, load `references/thesis/format-rules/tables-abstracts-citations-references.md` and enforce `FMT-ABSTRACT-002` with direct DOCX mixed-script font inspection; checking only the first abstract content run or a prose font-chain summary is not sufficient.

acceptance_fields: no project-local thick helper execution before preflight?
final handoff allowed by skill lock?

rules.heading: ### EXEC-MAINT-072. Explicit Invocation Bootstrap Must Precede Project Work (Mandatory)
rules.router_anchor: - If any project inspection, DOCX inspection, code search, browser check, helper script, smoke check, or handoff text happens before the lock/checklist/audit bootstrap, route EXEC-MAINT-072 through `references/user-feedback/maintenance-and-structure.md`; mark the current run as contaminated/reference-only drift and restart from a fresh lock before mutation or handoff.
